title: Developer Advocate
description: Intuit, the global financial software leader, is hiring a Developer Advocate to champion our QuickBooks API ecosystem. Based hybrid in Irvine, you'll build relationships with developers, create technical content, and advocate for developer needs inside Intuit. Help small business developers build better solutions on our platform while growing your presence in the fintech community.
responsibilities: Develop and deliver technical content including blog posts, tutorials, and code samples
Engage with developer communities and attend conferences to represent Intuit
Build sample applications demonstrating QuickBooks API capabilities
Gather developer feedback and communicate insights to product teams
Mentor external developers and help troubleshoot integration issues
Collaborate with product, marketing, and engineering on developer initiatives

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field
skills: Full-stack web development (JavaScript, Python, or similar)
Familiarity with accounting or financial software (preferred)
Social media and content marketing experience

benefits: Flexible work arrangements and Intuit time off policy
